mission: Encode the authoritative idempotency, replay, and collision-handling law for the chosen backend runtime baseline.
laws: Every externally consequential mutation must originate from the durable outbox or an equivalent durable queue position tied back to CommandActionRecord.
Transport acknowledgement, webhook arrival, or provider acceptance is evidence only; user-visible success requires the governing proof upgrade and settlement chain.
Duplicate or reordered receipts may widen or supersede pending posture, but they may not mint a second business result.
Projection rebuild replays immutable canonical events under published contract versions; projections never become canonical truth during or after replay.
Raw PHI, transcripts, message bodies, phone numbers, and artifact contents move only by governed references or masked descriptors.

idempotency_strategies.label: Command action dedupe
idempotency_strategies.dedupe_key_formula: commandActionId or canonical mutation tuple hash
source_refs: forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 04 - No idempotency envelope on submit or replayed commands

idempotency_strategies.label: Canonical adapter effect key
source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#6.6A Adapter outbox, inbox, and callback replay rule

idempotency_strategies.label: Receipt checkpoint replay key
idempotency_strategies.dedupe_key_formula: adapter correlation key plus ordering policy tuple
idempotency_strategies.result_if_duplicate: update the existing attempt or open ReplayCollisionReview
source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#6.6A Adapter outbox, inbox, and callback replay rule

idempotency_strategies.label: Booking commit idempotency
idempotency_strategies.result_if_duplicate: reuse the current BookingTransaction or authoritative confirmation gate

idempotency_strategies.label: Pharmacy dispatch idempotency
idempotency_strategies.dedupe_key_formula: dispatchPlanHash plus packageHash plus provider scope

idempotency_strategies.label: Timer wakeup cursor
idempotency_strategies.dedupe_key_formula: checkpointRef plus dueAt plus monotone revision
idempotency_strategies.result_if_duplicate: recompute current checkpoint and no-op if unchanged

idempotency_strategies.label: Restore and assurance action gate
idempotency_strategies.dedupe_key_formula: selected anchor tuple plus restore intent hash
idempotency_strategies.result_if_duplicate: return the current restore or review settlement
source_refs: phase-9-the-assurance-ledger.md#9C. Audit explorer, break-glass review, and support replay

replay_rules.label: Canonical event append-only replay
replay_rules.collision_posture: quarantine or publish new contract version

replay_rules.label: Command settlement replay
replay_rules.collision_posture: open assurance review and do not mint second result

replay_rules.label: Projection rebuild from immutable event history
replay_rules.collision_posture: block publication until compatibility digest matches

replay_rules.label: FHIR rematerialization from published mapping contracts
replay_rules.collision_posture: publish new mapping contract and replay proof

replay_rules.label: Support replay and restore scope replay
replay_rules.collision_posture: restore gate remains closed until current scope tuple matches

source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#6.6A Adapter outbox, inbox, and callback replay rule
